markets.question: Spread: ADC Juan Pablo II College (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Peru Liga 1 game, scheduled for March 21 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "ADC Juan Pablo II College" if ADC Juan Pablo II College win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Club Alianza Lima".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on liga1.pe. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.
markets.outcomes: ["ADC Juan Pablo II College", "Club Alianza Lima"]

markets.description:
In the upcoming Peru Liga 1 game between Club Alianza Lima and ADC Juan Pablo II College, scheduled for March 21 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Club Alianza Lima and ADC Juan Pablo II College each score at least one goal during the game.
